details.explanation: He can handle straightforward repairs and keep a house running without outside help. The basement pipe episode and his routine maintenance habits suggest practical, hands-on competence. He is less likely to be elegant or fast than stubbornly effective.

details.explanation: He does not trust a fix until he has traced it himself. That shows a solid ability to spot where something is going wrong, especially in home systems. He may be slow and argumentative, but he is not casual about finding the actual fault.
